narrative:
Warren Twp township has 2,614 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.4 percentage points.
